title: Add GitHub main-ruleset drift checker
goal: Add a read-only script and CI fixture suite that detects unsafe drift between the committed main ruleset and GitHub.
acceptance_criteria: The checker authenticates through gh, makes read-only API calls, and never prints tokens.

It validates main-only targeting, PR-only admin bypass, one latest-push approval, resolved threads, GitHub-Actions-bound full-check and postgres-sync, loose status mode, deletion protection, and force-push blocking.
Offline fixtures cover equal, missing-rule, wrong-integration, strict-mode, and over-broad-target cases.
CI runs fixture tests on every PR and documents the live maintainer command.
scripts/preflight.ps1 -Mode core and the narrow fixture suite pass.

verification_policy.rubric: Both verifier agents must independently confirm every acceptance criterion and all required deterministic checks from public evidence. Either may reject; only matching signatures settle.
